n_deaths_cocaine.long_name: Provisional cocaine overdose death count (12-month rolling total)
n_deaths_cocaine.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional death counts involving cocaine.
n_deaths_cocaine.long_description: Provisional count of deaths involving cocaine (ICD-10 T40.5), reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
n_deaths_cocaine.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional cocaine overdose deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

n_deaths_heroin.long_name: Provisional heroin overdose death count (12-month rolling total)
n_deaths_heroin.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional death counts involving heroin.
n_deaths_heroin.long_description: Provisional count of deaths involving heroin (ICD-10 T40.1), reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
n_deaths_heroin.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional heroin overdose deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

n_deaths_methadone.long_name: Provisional methadone overdose death count (12-month rolling total)
n_deaths_methadone.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional death counts involving methadone.
n_deaths_methadone.long_description: Provisional count of deaths involving methadone (ICD-10 T40.3), reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
n_deaths_methadone.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional methadone overdose deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

n_deaths_any_opioid.long_name: Provisional opioid overdose death count (12-month rolling total)
n_deaths_any_opioid.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional death counts involving natural, semi-synthetic, or synthetic opioids including methadone.
n_deaths_any_opioid.long_description: Provisional count of deaths involving natural, semi-synthetic, and synthetic opioids including methadone (ICD-10 T40.2–T40.4), reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
n_deaths_any_opioid.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional opioid overdose deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

n_deaths_all_cause.long_name: Provisional all-cause death count (12-month rolling total)
n_deaths_all_cause.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional all-cause death counts.
n_deaths_all_cause.long_description: Provisional count of deaths from all causes, reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
n_deaths_all_cause.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional all-cause deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

n_deaths_overdose.short_description: Provisional count of drug overdose deaths. State-level data are 12-month rolling totals; county-level data are monthly.
n_deaths_overdose.long_description: Provisional count of deaths from drug overdose. State-level values (data.csv.gz) are 12-month backward rolling totals. County-level values (data_county.csv.gz) are monthly provisional counts. Data are provisional and subject to revision. Counts of 1–9 at the county level are suppressed by NCHS and imputed as 5; see suppressed_flag.
n_deaths_overdose.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional drug overdose deaths.

pct_complete.short_description: Percentage of death records that have been fully processed for the reporting period.
pct_complete.long_description: Percentage of death records that are complete (i.e., not pending investigation or correction) for the given state and time period. Higher values indicate more finalized data. National and state level.
pct_complete.statement: In {location}, {value}% of death records were complete as of {time}.

pct_pending_invest.long_name: Percent of death records pending investigation
pct_pending_invest.short_description: Percentage of death records still pending investigation for the reporting period.
pct_pending_invest.long_description: Percentage of death records that are still under investigation (e.g., awaiting toxicology results or cause-of-death determination). Records pending investigation may have incomplete drug involvement information. Available at the state level (data.csv.gz) and county level (data_county.csv.gz).
pct_pending_invest.statement: In {location}, {value}% of death records were pending investigation as of {time}.

suppressed_flag.short_description: Indicates whether the death count was suppressed by NCHS due to small cell size.
suppressed_flag.long_description: Value is 1 if the death count was suppressed by NCHS (0–9 events) and 0 otherwise. A value of 5 is used as a placeholder for suppressed counts. County-level only (data_county.csv.gz).
suppressed_flag.statement: The death count for {location} at {time} was {value} (suppressed).

rate_all_causes.short_description: Quarterly age-adjusted death rate from all causes per 100,000 population.
rate_all_causes.long_description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rate for all causes of death, expressed per 100,000 population. Based on 3-month period estimates. National and state level.
rate_all_causes.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted all-cause mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

rate_alzheimer_disease.short_description: Quarterly age-adjusted death rate from Alzheimer's disease per 100,000 population.
rate_alzheimer_disease.long_description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rate for Alzheimer's disease, expressed per 100,000 population. Based on 3-month period estimates. National and state level.
rate_alzheimer_disease.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted Alzheimer's disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

rate_covid_19.long_description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rate for COVID-19, expressed per 100,000 population. Based on 3-month period estimates. National and state level.
rate_covid_19.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted COVID-19 mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

rate_chronic_lower_respiratory_diseases.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted chronic lower respiratory disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

rate_diabetes.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted diabetes mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

rate_drug_overdose.long_description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rate for drug overdose deaths, expressed per 100,000 population. Based on 3-month period estimates. National and state level.
rate_drug_overdose.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted drug overdose mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

rate_falls_ages_65_and_over.short_description: Quarterly age-adjusted death rate from falls among adults 65 and over per 100,000 population.

rate_falls_ages_65_and_over.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted falls mortality rate (65+) was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

rate_firearm_related_injury.long_description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rate for firearm-related injuries (including homicide, suicide, and unintentional), expressed per 100,000 population. Based on 3-month period estimates. National and state level.
rate_firearm_related_injury.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted firearm-related injury mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

rate_heart_disease.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted heart disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

rate_homicide.long_description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rate for homicide, expressed per 100,000 population. Based on 3-month period estimates. National and state level.

rate_hypertension.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted hypertension mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

nchs_vsrr_state.name: NCHS VSRR Provisional Drug Overdose Death Counts (State)
nchs_vsrr_state.description: Provisional monthly counts of drug overdose deaths by type of drug, reported as 12-month backward rolling totals. Includes deaths involving cocaine, heroin, methadone, and opioids broadly. Data are from the Vital Statistics Rapid Release (VSRR) program and are provisional, meaning they are subject to revision as more death certificates are received and processed. Covers national and state levels. New York City and New York State are combined.
nchs_vsrr_state.restrictions: Public domain. CDC/NCHS data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

nchs_vsrr_county.name: NCHS VSRR Provisional County-Level Drug Overdose Death Counts
nchs_vsrr_county.description: Provisional monthly counts of drug overdose deaths at the county level, from the Vital Statistics Rapid Release (VSRR) program. Data are provisional and subject to revision. Counts of 1–9 deaths are suppressed to protect privacy and imputed as 5; the suppressed_flag column identifies these records.
nchs_vsrr_county.restrictions: Public domain. CDC/NCHS data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

nchs_vsrr_quarterly.name: NCHS VSRR Quarterly Provisional Estimates for Selected Indicators of Mortality
nchs_vsrr_quarterly.description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rates for 21 selected causes of death, from the Vital Statistics Rapid Release (VSRR) program. Rates are based on 3-month period estimates and are expressed per 100,000 population. Covers national and state levels. Data are provisional and subject to revision.
nchs_vsrr_quarterly.restrictions: Public domain. CDC/NCHS data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
